name: NavigationMenuTriggerLink
description:
A link that can be placed inside `TriggerGroup` for top-level navigation.
Renders an `<a>` element.

active.description: Whether the trigger link points to the currently active page.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: NavigationMenu.TriggerLink.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: NavigationMenu.TriggerLink.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-popup-open.description: Present when the corresponding navigation menu is open.

data-active.description: Present when the trigger link points to the currently active page.
